{{CargoRelic
|name=Superior Fighter Medal
|class_id=20937
|rank=Green
|affct=FAME
|source=
|description=A customized medal, specially made by the Traveler Association for new members who passed the Superior Fighter Evaluation to recognize their mighty power.
|fame=33
|art=19
|fth=13
|civ=12
|tech=13
|ss1=Per Sign-In, Snail ATK +3<br>Sign-Ins: 20/20
|ss2=Per Sign-In, Snail ATK +4<br>Sign-Ins: 20/20
|ss3=Per Sign-In, Snail ATK +5<br>Sign-Ins: 20/20
|ss4=Per Sign-In, Snail ATK +5<br>Sign-Ins: 20/20
|ss7=Per Sign-In, Snail ATK +5<br>Sign-Ins: 20/20<br> (Awakened)
}}
